blocks.body: Past Continuous Passive is used to describe actions that continued at a certain time in the past or occurred in parallel with other actions. Formula: was/were + being + V3.

{ "title": "10. Short summary", "items": [ "Past Continuous Passive: was/were + being + V3.", "Choose be: I/He/She/It → was, You/We/They → were.", "being is an invariant part, always before V3.", "Negation: was/were + not + being + V3.", "Question: Was/Were + Subject + being + V3?", "Used for: continued actions in the past, parallel actions.", "Time markers: at 5 PM, when, while, all day, etc.", "Do not confuse with Past Simple Passive (completed action)!" ] }
